docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAVIER, SARELLO

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON APR-29-2026 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF SARELLO JAVIER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT VIA ZOOM. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER HITE, CLERK: V WU, NOT REPORTED (D206)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAVIER, SARELLO

REMARK: NO HEARING HELD FOR 04/15/26 EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION. THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY THE MOVING PARTY, AND NO SIGN-UP ON THE COURT CALL LIST. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1201(5).

FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT FILED BY SARELLO JAVIER ON APR-13-26 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (D206)

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAVIER, SARELLO AS TO DEFENDANT WEBER, TYLER SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-12-2026
